themes.label: Grace
themes.summary: John ties the coming of Christ to fullness, grace, and truth rather than mere abstract revelation. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Thomas Aquinas on Commentary on John: He follows with, Of his fullness we have all received w...". Cross references echo "Grace".
